title: April 15th, 2019
body:
#twitter feed

lyrics

i get my rhythm from the whipping of a flag

in the wind

might as well be a rag the way i rip it and shred

if this isn't my bag i'm guessing that ain't my wallet

guess this ain't my phone let's see who pick up when i call em

if i rocked the boat let's see who row when i fall in
